title: Runtime container + codegen lowering for launch/with

source.subject: feat(composition): runtime container, ABI builtins, and codegen lowering for launch/with

body:
Codegen lowers `launch` and `with` into runtime container ABI builtins, connecting the composition language surface to the Phase B runtime.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`052d6e2`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/052d6e2)
- **Subject:** feat(composition): runtime container, ABI builtins, and codegen lowering for launch/with
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `concurrency-runtime`
- **Domain:** `execution`

## Relation
Lands in the v0.3 cutoff window (`f57377a`→`aaddd32`) under workstream `concurrency-runtime`.
